ref: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.449, p.187 (1986)
title: Nuclear spectroscopy of 26Al

x4freetext: Nuclear spectroscopy of 26Al

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.449, p.187 (1986)

x4freetext: A 60 um thick annular silicon surface barrier
detector cooled to - 50 degr. was used to detect
the alpha particles between 174.1 and 176.5 degrees.
The targets consisted of 30 and 50 ug/cm2 of natural
Si evaporated onto backings of about 10 ug/cm2 carbon
enriched to 99.9% in 12C.
